questions: Volleyball team e koto jon thake?
answers: Volleyball is a team sport where two teams of 6 players are separated by a net. Teams score points by grounding the ball on the other team's court. It's popular worldwide and also an Olympic sport.
Volleyball te prottek team 3 bar ball touch korte pare net er upor diye pathate. Sets 25 points e hoy (deciding set 15 points). Rally point system e khela hoy, mane prottek rally te point hoy.

Beach volleyball is a variation played on sand with 2 players per side instead of 6. It's a popular summer sport and Olympic event, requiring even more athleticism since there are fewer players covering the court.
Volleyball requires teamwork, communication, and skills like serving, passing (bumping), setting, spiking, and blocking. A good spike can be nearly impossible to defend if timed and placed correctly.
